root.sql: select memno_1 ,memno_2 ,seq_no from sc_rep_2label_mem_retire where 1 = 1 /*WHERE*/ order by seq_no

r_ktm_rep_label_mem_retire_nest.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, (decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no,null,'','เลขที่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no) ||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.moo,null,'','หมู่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.moo) ||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.road,null,'',' ถ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.road) ||decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.soi,null,'',' ซ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.soi) ) as address1, (decode(sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol,null,'',decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code,'10','แขวง','ต.')||sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol) ||decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name,null,'',decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code,'10',' เขต',' อ.')||sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name) ||decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name,null,'',decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code,'10',' ',' จ.')||sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name) ) as address2, ( 'รหัส. '||sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode ) as address3 from sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_district where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) = ( select end_date + 1 from sc_lon_m_close_year where lon_year = '!lon_year_1!' ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = {0} ) -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '013491' ) order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
